card_name_verified: Free Spirit® Travel More World Elite Mastercard® (BoA, $0 intro / $79 after first year)
_review_reason: Per Convention C: $100 companion flight voucher requires $5,000 annual spend (CONDITIONAL → exclude). 2 free checked bags (qualitative). Earnings 3x Spirit / 2x dining+grocery. SQPs (status qualifying points) not USD. No fixed USD recurring credits.
